case_title: MAY KWAN VS. JOSE GALA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, MAY SERVED FEB-25-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, DARLENE INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA DARLENE'S FABRICS
